title: Spicy Korean Beef Stir-fry
description: This spicy dish features tender beef mixed with a zesty blend of lemongrass and other seasonings for a perfect hangover-cure meal.
instructions: Clean and finely chop the beef. Thinly slice the lemongrass.
In a wok or large skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add sliced lemongrass and sauté for 1 minute.
Add ginger and garlic to the wok and stir-fry for an additional 30 seconds.
Add beef, red pepper flakes, soy sauce, salt (to taste), and enough water to cover the ingredients. Stir until well combined.
Simmer for about 5 minutes or until the meat is cooked through. Adjust seasoning if needed.
